rulings.Case Title: GLORIA MUNMON VS. SANDY GAIL MUNMON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 8, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT SANDY MUNMON DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to each cause of action for Plaintiff to clearly allege each element of each cause of action as to each of her distinct claims (1) Property and (2) SSI and US Bank account. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA MUNMON VS. SANDY GAIL MUNMON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 8, 2020 line 1. =(501/CFH) DEFENDANT SANDY MUNMON MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is DENIED.
